expectations.text: The response mentions .claude/agents/ as the directory for defining custom agents
expectations.evidence: Shows '.claude/agents/' for project and '~/.claude/agents/' for personal scope.

expectations.text: The response mentions claude --agent=<name> as the way to invoke a custom agent
expectations.evidence: 'claude --agent code-reviewer' documented as one of four invocation methods.

expectations.text: The response explains the agent file format (markdown with frontmatter or specific structure)
expectations.evidence: Full frontmatter reference table with all supported fields. Complete example with YAML frontmatter + markdown body.
